subject: refactor(typescript): migrate config + utils to TypeScript, wire App.jsx layout components
body:
TypeScript migration Phases 1-2:
- Added tsconfig.json with strict mode, ESNext modules, bundler resolution
- Migrated config/textDefaults.js → .ts with TextLayer, FreeformBlock interfaces
- Migrated config/fonts.js → .ts with FontEntry interface
- Migrated config/sampleImages.js → .ts
- Migrated utils/layoutHelpers.js → .ts with Section interface

App.jsx layout extraction wiring:
- App.jsx render branches now use ReaderMode, MobileLayout, DesktopLayout
- App.jsx reduced from ~814 to ~530 lines (state orchestrator role)
- Props passed to each layout component

Documentation:
- TODO.md updated: 9 items completed, 3 remaining (wire validation,
  TS phases 3-4, expand test coverage)
- HISTORY.md updated with all completed work

Tags: typescript, refactor, migration, app-layout, config
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: typescript-migration
Semver: patch
